perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman holds a smartphone displaying TinyTAN characters and a McDonald's promotion, looking extremely excited and vocal. (2) A fast-paced montage shows her repeatedly pestering her boyfriend (who is sitting on a sofa or walking) about the TinyTAN blind boxes in various locations. (3) She arrives at a McDonald's storefront, looks inside, then turns to the camera with a devastated expression. (4) She is seen crying outside on the street near a McDonald's sign, holding her head. (5) Back indoors on a sofa, she is eating a McFlurry while scrolling through her phone, appearing to explain the specific rules and dates of the promotion to the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, fast-paced background music begins with the woman speaking in a high-pitched, excited tone. (2) Repetitive vocal clips of the woman saying "TinyTAN..." are layered over short scene cuts, accompanied by cartoonish "ding" and "whoosh" sound effects. (3) The music becomes slightly more dramatic/melancholic as she fake-cries outside the store. (4) The music settles into a steady, rhythmic pop beat as she speaks clearly and informatively while eating.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) POV 女友有想要的東西的時候 (POV When your girlfriend wants something) - Decorative/Hook. (2) 上禮拜看到麥當勞的新聞 (Saw McDonald's news last week) - Functional. (3) TinyTAN 盲盒 (TinyTAN Blind Box) - Functional. (4) (ARMY本人) (Actually an ARMY) - Decorative. (5) 希望可以抽到啊 (Hope I can get it) - Functional. (6) 成功? (Success?) - Hook. (7) 3分鐘後... (3 minutes later...) - Functional. (8) 日期記錯!!! (Got the date wrong!!!) - Decorative/Emotional. (9) 10月8號 上午10點30分起 (Starting Oct 8th, 10:30 AM) - Functional.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Anticipation -> Obsessive Request -> Failure at the Scene -> Post-failure Explanation and Detail Sharing.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female main creator, 1 male boyfriend appearing in the background and side views.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young Asian woman with long dark hair, wearing a white floral/patterned top, highly expressive and animated.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A domestic living room with a neutral sofa and wall art, followed by a bright urban street setting in front of a McDonald's restaurant.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Bright, natural daylight and soft indoor lighting.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based -> Linear: Hook (POV) -> Progression of persuasion -> Climax (The Fail) -> Informational Outro.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video serves as a comedic promotional piece for the McDonald's x TinyTAN collaboration. It uses a relatable 'obsessive fan' POV narrative to build engagement while clearly relaying the specific launch dates, pricing, and purchase rules for the blind boxes at the end.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of McDonald's products, mention of specific campaign dates/prices, and focus on the TinyTAN blind box collectible.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-pitched repetitive vocal hooks, 'POV' title card, fast-cut editing style typical of short-form social video.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The creator effectively blends entertainment (the boyfriend-girlfriend dynamic) with a clear call to action and information regarding the product launch.
